content: Hi! My email changed. Can I just update afp-devel/metadata/authors.toml or is there anything to be aware of? Similarly, I've updated the LaTeX abstract of an entry. Do I just update afp-devel/metadata/entries/X.toml correspondingly or is there more to it? Thanks! :-)

If you change the metadata then make sure that you didn't break anything, e.g. by invoking isabelle afp_check_metadata.
And the abstract for entries is not latex but mathjax. If you want a preview of that, use isabelle afp_edit_metadata.
